parameters-en.Left Time: Adjusts the length of time before the left delay's first repeat. When set to note values, Time follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Right Time: Adjusts the length of time before the right delay's first repeat. When set to note values, Time follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.LFeedback: Controls the number of repeats for the left delay. When set to 0%, only one repeat is heard; at 100%, the delay repeats forever.
parameters-en.RFeedback: Controls the number of repeats for the right delay. When set to 0%, only one repeat is heard; at 100%, the delay repeats forever.
parameters-en.Left Mix: Controls the blend between the left channel's repeats and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Right Mix: Controls the blend between the left channel's repeats and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (or high pass) filter to the repeats, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (or low pass) filter to the repeats, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency.
parameters-en.Mod Mode: Selects the type of modulation applied to the repeats--None ("Off"), Chorus, or Vibrato.
parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the modulation. Does nothing if Mod Mode is set to "Off"
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the modulation. Does nothing if Mod Mode is set to "Off"
parameters-en.Spread: Controls the apparent stereo width of the modulation between the left and right channels. Does nothing if Mod Mode is set to "Off"
